creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Also, I'm trying to give maintainer approval on the patch, but it doesn't seem to work. I'm going to attachments => Details => Under Flags:=> Fernape: maintainer-approval and I change "?" to "+" and submit. But it does not seem to do anything.

Take this comment as maintainer approval as no functional change intended and petting linters is just fine! Thanks.
